character_dossiers.name: Jim
character_dossiers.biography: Participated in retrieving the chest from the Admiral Benbow, assisted his mother in navigating the village's reluctance to aid them, and handled the Black Spot message.

character_dossiers.name: my mother
character_dossiers.biography: Led efforts to secure assistance from the village, delivered a defiant speech to the villagers, and coordinated the retrieval of the chest.

character_dossiers.name: Captain Flint
character_dossiers.biography: Dead seaman whose body was found in the Admiral Benbow, associated with the Black Spot message and a buried chest.

character_dossiers.name: Dr. Livesey
character_dossiers.biography: Physician mentioned as a destination for riders seeking assistance.

character_dossiers.name: Mrs. Crossley
character_dossiers.biography: Village resident referenced in the mother's speech as someone who would bring back lawful money.
